data.title: HTTPS/TLS Protocol
data.description: Encryption to secure data in transit for user security.

data.title: Secure Authentication Mechanisms
data.technical_spec: Combination of SMS-based and app-based authentication.

data.title: Web Application Firewall (WAF)
data.description: Protects against cross-site scripting and SQL injection.
data.technical_spec: Integration with a cloud-based WAF provider.

data.title: Data Loss Prevention (DLP)
data.description: Monitors and protects sensitive data from being accessed or shared.
data.technical_spec: Automated systems for detecting and blocking threats.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Routine security checks to identify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Internal team conducting manual and automated reviews.
